name: Simple Adventure
description: A minimal adventure template. Use this with the Adventure prompt set to fully sculpt your own tone, world, and rules without the default GM tuning.
world: A small world. You can edit this in the scenario file or override with your own prompt set.
opening_situation: The heroes are at the start. What happens next is up to the players and your prompts.

locations.name: The Start
locations.description: Where the story begins. Add or change locations in the scenario template or via your prompts.

writing_style.tone: Clear and simple. Sculpt this in the Adventure prompt set.
writing_style.pacing: Steady. One thing at a time.

special_rules: Keep the story easy to follow. One main thread.
You can add or change these rules in the scenario file or in the Adventure prompt set.
